Uses of Package
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Packages that use com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension
 
  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
    Class
    Description
    ExtensibleObjectValidator
    Validates the requirements of an Object.
    ExtensibleObjectVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Object but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be an ObjectVerifier.
  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
    Class
    Description
    ExtensibleBooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a BooleanValidator.
    ExtensibleBooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a BooleanVerifier.
    ExtensibleCollectionValidator
    Validates the requirements of a collection of elements but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a CollectionValidator.
    ExtensibleCollectionVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a collection of elements but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a CollectionVerifier.
    ExtensibleComparableValidator
    Validates the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ComparableValidator.
    ExtensibleComparableVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a ComparableVerifier.
    ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator
    Validates the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointValidator.
    ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointVerifier.
    ExtensibleIntegerValidator
    Validates the requirements of an integer value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a IntegerValidator.
    ExtensibleIntegerVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an integer value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a IntegerVerifier.
    ExtensibleNumberValidator
    Validates the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a NumberValidator.
    ExtensibleNumberVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a NumberVerifier.
    ExtensibleObjectValidator
    Validates the requirements of an Object.
    ExtensibleObjectVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Object but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be an ObjectVerifier.
    ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator
    Validates the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g.
    ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g.
